findings.description: The comment in the code example was modified from the source. Source has `// SqlRowからEntityの生成` but the knowledge file has `// SqlRowからEntityの生成（コンストラクタ使用）`. The text `（コンストラクタ使用）` was added and has no basis in the source.
findings.source_evidence:
// SqlRowからEntityの生成
SampleEntity entity = new SampleEntity(inputData);

findings.description: PascalCase class names appearing in the code example are missing from hints: `ExecutionContext`, `DateUtil`, `Success`.
findings.source_evidence: public Result handle(SqlRow inputData, ExecutionContext ctx) { ... entity.setDate(DateUtil.addDay(...)); return new Success(); }
